steps.title: Add the equations
steps.content:
The terms $4(y-12)$ and $-4(y-12)$ cancel when the equations are added:
$$
\frac{x}{7}+\frac{x}{3}=31+41
$$

steps.title: Clear the denominators
steps.content: Simplify and multiply by $21$: $$ \frac{x}{7}+\frac{x}{3}=72 $$ $$ 3x+7x=1{,}512 $$ $$ 10x=1{,}512 $$ The answer is 1512.
